description: RimWorld Colony Command Center — full telemetry overview. Dusty Indigo edition v2.
title: ⚔ RimWorld Colony Command Center

panels.title: Free Colonists
panels.description: Colonists free to work and fight.

panels.title: Food Days
panels.description: Estimated days of food remaining.

panels.title: Threat Points
panels.description: Storyteller threat budget. Higher = nastier raids incoming.

panels.title: Silver
panels.description: Silver in stockpile — your trading currency.

panels.title: Hostile Pawns
panels.description: Enemies currently on the map.

panels.title: Avg Mood
panels.description: Colony average mood. Watch for drop toward break thresholds.

panels.title: Power Balance
panels.description: Production minus consumption. Negative = blackout risk.

panels.title: Fire
panels.description: Active fires on map. Any fire is bad.

panels.title: Research %
panels.description: Current research project progress.

panels.title: Wealth & Threat Points
panels.description: Colony wealth growth vs storyteller threat budget. Rising threat = harder raids.

panels.title: Population Over Time
panels.description: Free colonists, prisoners, and slaves over time.

panels.title: Mood per Colonist
panels.description: Mood level per colonist (0–1). Dashed lines = average break thresholds.

panels.title: Negative Thoughts
panels.description: Early warning: spikes here precede mental breaks.

panels.title: Health & Pain
panels.description: Current health and pain levels per colonist.

panels.title: Key Resources
panels.description: Stockpile history for critical materials.

panels.title: Food Days History
panels.description: Watch for downward trend — catch food crisis before it hits.

panels.title: Wealth Breakdown
panels.description: Wealth composition over time: items, buildings, pawns.

panels.title: Threat Points & Hostiles
panels.description: Storyteller budget and active hostile count.

panels.title: Faction Goodwill
panels.description: Below 0 = hostile. Watch for sudden drops.

panels.title: Combat State
panels.description: All should be 0 in peacetime.

panels.title: Power Grid
panels.description: Production vs consumption. When they cross = blackout.

panels.title: Battery Level
panels.description: Combined battery storage as % of total capacity.

panels.title: Room Temperatures
panels.description: Average room temps by role + outdoor. 0°C = freezing.

panels.title: Research Progress
panels.description: Active research project progress.

panels.title: Tamed Animals
panels.description: Animals tamed by species.

panels.title: Active Map Conditions
panels.description: Currently active environmental map conditions.

panels.title: Event Feed
panels.description: All colony events from Loki. Newest first.
